dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4318 IS: Breast Cancer Stamp Reauthorization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Rosen (for herself, Mrs. Moody, Ms. Hirono, Mrs. Capito, Mrs. Shaheen, and Mrs. Hyde-Smith) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 39, United States Code, to extend the authority of the United States Postal Service to issue a semipostal stamp to raise funds for breast cancer research.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Breast Cancer Stamp Reauthorization Act.

section.header: Extension of postage stamp for breast cancer research
section.text: Section 414(h) of title 39, United States Code, is amended by striking 2027 and inserting 2037.
